---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Azathioprine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Azathioprine</strong> 目前有 <strong>3 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Azathioprine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Jayempi is indicated in combination with other immunosuppressive agents for the prophylaxis of transplant rejection in patients receiving allogenic kidney, liver, heart, lung or pancreas transplants....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（100.0%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis susceptibility（99.7%）</li>
<li>WHIM syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>inflammatory bowel disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease, chronic, autosomal recessive, 5（99.4%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease with defect in neutrophil chemotaxis（99.4%）</li>
<li>ulcerative colitis (disease)（99.3%）</li>
<li>acromesomelic dysplasia, Hunter-Thompson type（99.3%）</li>
<li>functional neutrophil defect（99.3%）</li>
<li>Crohn disease of the esophagus（99.3%）</li>
<li>anus disease（99.2%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（99.2%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（99.2%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia-amelogenesis imperfecta syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia（99.0%）</li>
<li>myosclerosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis with juvenile macular dystrophy（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/azathioprine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
